import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut start = i
      mut neg = false
      if b == 45
        neg = true
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut has = false
      while i < n
        let c = match string.byte_at(line, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if c >= 48 and c <= 57
          num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
          has = true
          i = i + 1
        else
          i = n + 1
          i = i
          start = start
          # break out
        end
        if c < 48 or c > 57
          i = i
          start = n + 1
        end
      end
      if has
        if neg
          num = -num
        end
        product = product * num
      end
      start = start
    end
  end
  println("product=#{product}")
end
